codeReview.summary: Risk-tiered merge feature is fully implemented with three merge strategies (AutoMerge, AutoMergeWithAiReview, HumanReview) based on task risk level and confidence score. All 25 tiered_merge tests and 43 merge_queue tests pass. Integration with merge_queue.rs is correct.

summary: Feature orch-risk-tiered-merge PASSES review. The implementation correctly provides: Low-risk tasks with confidence >= 0.7 get auto-merge; Medium-risk tasks with confidence >= 0.85 get auto-merge with AI review; High-risk tasks always require human review. All tests pass and code compiles cleanly.
